title: Lysiosepalum hexandrum

Lysiosepalum hexandrum is often classified in the genus Lysiosepalum, which is a monotypic genus. This genus is part of the Haemodoraceae family, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as bloodroot or spider lily.
